feature_otp_verification.name: Enable OTP Verification

feature_continue_watching.description: Show recently watched lectures on home.

feature_profile_editing.description: Allow students to change their details.

feature_single_device_access.description: Restrict account to only one active device at a time.

watermarkSettings.pageDescription: Configure and manage watermarks for your platform content.
watermarkSettings.selectContentTypeDesc: Choose a content type to configure its watermark settings individually
watermarkSettings.enableWatermarkDesc: Show watermark on protected content pages
watermarkSettings.useStudentIdDesc: Show each student's unique code on their content pages instead of custom text
watermarkSettings.usePhoneNumberDesc: Show student's phone number alongside their code in the watermark
watermarkSettings.colorDesc: Choose the color of the watermark text
watermarkSettings.positionDesc: Choose where the watermark appears on the screen
watermarkSettings.dynamicPositionDesc: Watermark moves to random positions every few seconds
watermarkSettings.dynamicIntervalDesc: Seconds between position changes (1-5 seconds, random)
watermarkSettings.randomCoordinatesDesc: Move freely anywhere on screen instead of fixed positions
watermarkSettings.movementPatternDesc: Choose how the watermark travels between positions
watermarkSettings.sizeDesc: Choose the size of the watermark text
watermarkSettings.useCustomPreviewTextDesc: Test with custom text that won't be saved
watermarkSettings.enableVoiceDesc: Play voice announcements at regular intervals
watermarkSettings.voiceIntervalDesc: Play voice announcement every X minutes (1-30 minutes)
